ast.source: Move left to decrease speed (slower playback)
ast.target: 向左移动以降低速度（较慢播放）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Move right to increase speed (faster playback)
ast.target: 向右移动以提高速度（较快播放）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Ribbon icon element is not initialized.
ast.target: 功能区图标元素未初始化。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 文本转语音处理中出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which text-to-speech engine to use. AWS Polly, ElevenLabs, and Google Cloud offer the same plugin features; each uses its own credentials and voices.
ast.target: 选择要使用的文本转语音引擎。AWS Polly、ElevenLabs 和 Google Cloud 提供相同的插件功能；各自使用其凭据和语音。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a voice tone, gender, and language for a personalized audio experience.
ast.target: 选择语音音色、性别和语言，以获得个性化的音频体验。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a preferred reading tempo for pleasant and comfortable audio playback.
ast.target: 设置偏好的朗读速度，以获得愉悦舒适的音频播放体验。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, uppercase words like NASA or API are spelled out letter by letter. Disable this if you want uppercase words to be pronounced normally. (Applies to AWS Polly.)
ast.target: 启用后，像 NASA 或 API 这样的大写单词将逐字母拼读。若希望大写单词正常发音，请禁用此选项。（适用于 AWS Polly。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, fenced code blocks (such as Mermaid, YAML, or other code) are read aloud. Disable this to skip code blocks and announce them as a short placeholder instead.
ast.target: 启用后，围栏代码块（如 Mermaid、YAML 或其他代码）将被朗读。禁用此选项可跳过代码块，并以简短占位符提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, website URLs (such as https://example.com or www.example.com) are removed and not read aloud. Disabled by default.
ast.target: 启用后，网站 URL（如 https://example.com 或 www.example.com）将被移除且不朗读。默认禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the generated MP3 is automatically saved next to the note after each successful playback—no need to press the download button. Disabled by default.
ast.target: 启用后，每次成功播放后生成的 MP3 将自动保存到笔记旁边，无需点击下载按钮。默认禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, saving an MP3 also inserts an audio embed in the note. This applies to both the download button and auto-save. Turn it off to download the MP3 without embedding it. Enabled by default.
ast.target: 启用后，保存 MP3 时还会在笔记中插入音频嵌入。此设置同时适用于下载按钮和自动保存。关闭此选项可下载 MP3 但不嵌入。默认启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the player's folder picker automatically switches to the folder of the note you are viewing. Disable it to keep the folder you selected in the player when you switch notes. Enabled by default.
ast.target: 启用后，播放器的文件夹选择器会自动切换到您正在查看的笔记所在文件夹。禁用后，切换笔记时将保留您在播放器中选择的文件夹。默认启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The OpenAI text-to-speech model. GPT-4o mini TTS is recommended; TTS-1 favours latency and TTS-1 HD favours quality.
ast.target: OpenAI 文本转语音模型。推荐使用 GPT-4o mini TTS；TTS-1 侧重低延迟，TTS-1 HD 侧重高质量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The Azure region of your Speech resource (must match the key).
ast.target: The Azure region of your Speech resource (must match the key).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The AWS Region for the Polly service.
ast.target: The AWS Region for the Polly service.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The ElevenLabs model used for synthesis. Multilingual v2 offers the best quality; Flash v2.5 is the fastest.
ast.target: 用于合成的 ElevenLabs 模型。Multilingual v2 提供最佳质量；Flash v2.5 速度最快。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 文件夹选择器跟随当前笔记

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Missing timestamp format, parsing value with Date constructor:
ast.target: 缺少时间戳格式，使用 Date 构造函数解析值：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Missing timestamp format, using epoch seconds
ast.target: 缺少时间戳格式，使用纪元秒数

ast.name: warn
ast.source: An error was encountered in a non-retryable streaming request.
ast.target: 在不可重试的流式请求中遇到错误。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: userAgentAppId must be a string or undefined.
ast.target: userAgentAppId 必须为字符串或 undefined。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The provided userAgentAppId exceeds the maximum length of 50 characters.
ast.target: 提供的 userAgentAppId 超过了 50 个字符的最大长度限制。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @smithy/config-resolver WARN - Please use the caller region instead of "*". See "sigv4a" in https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-js-v3/blob/main/supplemental-docs/CLIENTS.md.
ast.target: @smithy/config-resolver WARN - 请使用调用方区域而非 "*"。请参阅 https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-js-v3/blob/main/supplemental-docs/CLIENTS.md 中的 "sigv4a"。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: That file name contains characters that aren't allowed.
ast.target: 该文件名包含不允许的字符。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No audio available for this file. Please generate audio first.
ast.target: 此文件无可用音频。请先生成音频。

ast.target: 美国西部（加利福尼亚北部）

ast.source: AWS SDK for JavaScript Polly Client for Node.js, Browser and React Native
ast.target: 适用于 Node.js、浏览器和 React Native 的 AWS SDK for JavaScript Polly 客户端

ast.name: error
ast.source: Please enter your ElevenLabs API key.
ast.target: 请输入您的 ElevenLabs API 密钥。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid or expired ElevenLabs API key.
ast.target: ElevenLabs API 密钥无效或已过期。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Network error during validation. Please try again.
ast.target: 验证过程中发生网络错误。请重试。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Please enter your Google Cloud API key.
ast.target: 请输入您的 Google Cloud API 密钥。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid API key, or the Cloud Text-to-Speech API is not enabled for this key/project.
ast.target: 无效的 API 密钥，或此密钥/项目未启用 Cloud Text-to-Speech API。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Please enter your Azure Speech key and region.
ast.target: 请输入您的 Azure 语音密钥和区域。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid Azure Speech key, or it doesn't match the region.
ast.target: 无效的 Azure 语音密钥，或与区域不匹配。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Please enter your OpenAI API key.
ast.target: 请输入您的 OpenAI API 密钥。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid or expired OpenAI API key.
ast.target: 无效或已过期的 OpenAI API 密钥。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rewind by few seconds reading the current document.
ast.target: 向后倒回数秒朗读当前文档。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Fast-Forward by few seconds reading the current document.
ast.target: 向前快进数秒朗读当前文档。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Save the current audio as an MP3 and embed it in the note.
ast.target: 将当前音频保存为MP3并嵌入到笔记中。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Play or Stop reading the current document.
ast.target: 播放或停止朗读当前文档。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reading tempo increased by 15% for a faster pace of the current document.
ast.target: 阅读速度提升 15%，以加快当前文档的朗读节奏。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reading tempo increased by 25% for a faster pace of the current document.
ast.target: 阅读速度提升 25%，以加快当前文档的朗读节奏。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reading tempo reduced by 15% for a slower pace of the current document.
ast.target: 阅读速度降低 15%，以减慢当前文档的朗读节奏。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reading tempo reduced by 25% for a slower pace of the current document.
ast.target: 阅读速度降低 25%，以减慢当前文档的朗读节奏。
